meaning: n.同盟,联盟,盟约,联合会,社团v.组联盟,(使)加盟
examples: United were league champions last season.
The New England team is the worst in the league.
And Buffy spin-off character Angel, the vampire with a soul, was rated ninth in the league.
The NFL Players Association is arguing that the league is misrepresenting its economic situation.
